audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with no significant prosody or background noise.
temporal_description: A man with dark hair is seated in a car, viewed in profile, with rain streaking the window. The scene transitions to a clock tower at night, followed by two men in suits walking side by side on an elevated walkway under artificial lighting. One man has dark hair, the other has white hair, both are walking forward with their heads slightly turned toward each other, maintaining a steady pace.
